headline: Amazon closed a multi-tranche Euro-denominated debt offering yielding approximately €14.45 billion in net proceeds.
investor_impact: This substantial €14.45 billion debt raise allows Amazon to optimize its capital structure and lock in favorable yields across a staggered maturity profile extending out to 2064. The influx of liquidity provides ample dry powder for general corporate purposes, capital expenditures, or strategic investments without equity dilution.
